output.formatted:
UEFA Champions League

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?label WHERE {
  wd:Q418282 rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| label                 |
| --------------------- |
| Eleutherius (lang:en) |
